creator: rodrigo@bebik.net
text:
Hi,

I didn't perform a deep analyse, but just like what I found
last time looking at the the PR ports/166838, the speedtest 
dev/release team doesn't use version number when they release the app,
causing a lot of pain to ports maintainers. I suspect 
the simple update of the distfile sum will solve the problem.
Now it's 1am, so I'll check this tomorrow morning. 

regards,
Rodrigo
